name: character-ui
description: A local-first character and system-instruction builder for AI assistants.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @character-ui/core && npm run build -w @character-ui/local-storage && npm run registry:build && npm run build -w @character-ui/web && npm run build -w @character-ui/cli && npm run build -w @character-ui/desktop
scripts.build:web: npm run build -w @character-ui/core && npm run registry:build && npm run build -w @character-ui/web
scripts.desktop: npm run build -w @character-ui/core && npm run build -w @character-ui/local-storage && npm run build -w @character-ui/web && npm run build -w @character-ui/desktop && npm run start -w @character-ui/desktop
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @character-ui/core && npm run build -w @character-ui/local-storage && npm run typecheck -w @character-ui/core && npm run typecheck -w @character-ui/local-storage && npm run typecheck -w @character-ui/web && npm run typecheck -w @character-ui/cli && npm run typecheck -w @character-ui/desktop
scripts.package:win: npm run build && npm run package:win -w @character-ui/desktop
scripts.verify: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run registry:validate && npm run test:coverage && npm run build
